series_metadata.series_title: Other States Coverage (OSC) Employer Policy File
series_metadata.series_description: Policy information for OSC including: completed applications for coverage on the ACORD 130 form, supplemental applications, quotes for coverage, copies of issued policies, endorsements, cancellation notices, non-renewal notices, denial letters. All documents are saved into UDS.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: per contract, maintain records in UDS. ; Paper: If record is paper (hard copy)
